# British Royalty Genealogy (1707 onwards)

## Description
Complete genealogy of the English and British monarchs and royal family from 1707 onwards in GEDCOM 5.5.1 format. This is a professional genealogy file covering the British royal line with extensive historical data and relationships.

## Test Case Type
- **Real royal genealogy**: Official British monarchy family tree
- **Large historical dataset**: Comprehensive royal family research
- **Complex relationships**: Multiple marriage lines, succession paths, and dynastic relationships
- **Professional genealogy software output**: Created with MyFamilyTree genealogy application

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5.1
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~77 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: MyFamilyTree

## Provenance
- **Source**: Chronoplex Software - My Family Tree Samples
- **URL**: https://chronoplexsoftware.com/myfamilytree/samples/
- **Availability**: Public sample files
- **Collection Date**: Historical genealogy research

## License & Usage
- **License**: Publicly available sample data
- **Attribution**: Chronoplex Software
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: None specified for educational use

## Testing Coverage
- Extensive royal family relationships
- Historical dates and places
- Multiple marriage scenarios with succession considerations
- Long genealogical chains spanning centuries
- Complex multi-generational structures
- Professional genealogy software conventions

## Notes
- Excellent for stress testing with moderately large datasets
- Contains real historical data suitable for validation testing
- Good for testing import of files with complex hierarchical structures
- Demonstrates professional genealogy software export capabilities
- Historical accuracy makes it suitable for educational testing scenarios
